status_line: SARAH just completed Run 99 with something to show for it — found and filed the Gallery one-sheet V2 from Downloads, fixed the scanner so it actually reads the real filesystem going forward. SCOUT saw nothing new in the market this morning. The Gallery is at 9.0 and sitting ready. GUARDIAN has been dark for 10 straight cycles and is still the bottleneck on both Sharpie and Gallery delivery. LA Galaxy window is at its edge — if Jacobi hasn't been reached today, that window is closing.
